synopsis: Fate of the Jedi: Apocalypse by Troy Denning is the ninth and final novel in the Fate of the Jedi series. It was released on March 13, 2012. At the end of the book, it has an introduction to X-Wing: Mercy Kill and Scourge. The audio version is narrated by Marc Thompson. The paperback edition was released on January 29, 2013.
title: Apocalypse
